sections.label: Profile
items: Art Director with 10+ years of hands-on experience shaping album, single and artist campaign visuals for independent and major entertainment releases.
Leads visual direction across release strategy, identity, packaging and campaign deliverables, helping projects build visibility across streaming platforms, press, billboards and digital marketing.

sections.label: Selected Achievements
items: Contributed visual direction to releases earning two RIAA Gold certifications for CAP and Cut It Out, and one RIAA Platinum certification for Bottom B****.
Directed campaign visuals presented on a Times Square billboard and recognized by VIBE in The 21 Best R&B Albums of 2021.
Directed visual strategy for releases reaching Billboard chart positions including #1 Smooth Jazz Airplay, #6 Heatseekers and #11 Hot R&B Songs.
Created album and single campaign visuals used across international digital marketing, playlist visibility and out-of-home advertising.
Directed visual campaigns for albums, singles and artist projects across R&B, jazz, pop and North African music.

Led visual direction for Tink releases including Winter's Diary 5, Heat of The Moment, A Gift and A Curse, Hopeless Romantic and Voicemails, supporting major streaming visibility, playlist placement and chart performance.
Directed visual work for Damien Escobar's Gemini, supporting the Billboard #1 Smooth Jazz Airplay single Taboo.
Created visual direction for campaigns connected to AFRIMA nominations and a continental award win for Shayfeen, Fnaire, Aminux and VAN.
Developed visual branding for Jackie Cruz's Lucia Ocho and Hija de Chavez, with coverage in Billboard, TeenVogue, LADYGUNN and EARMILK.
Directed visual deliverables for Noggin, maintaining consistency with brand requirements across digital and broadcast formats.
Coordinated with production and marketing teams to prepare assets for rollout and technical delivery.

items.projects: Winter's Diary 5, Heat of The Moment, A Gift and A Curse, Hopeless Romantic, Voicemails
